description_long: This is a modern L-shaped kitchen cabinetry set featuring a combination of tall pantry units, base cabinets, and wall-mounted cabinets. The cabinetry is finished in a smooth, matte white with a contrasting wood-textured countertop and backsplash. Integrated appliances, such as an oven and microwave, are built into the tall units, while a sink is set into the countertop beneath the wall cabinets. The design includes multiple drawers and doors, all with a minimalist, handle-less appearance, likely utilizing finger grooves or push-to-open mechanisms. The cabinetry is designed to be installed against two intersecting walls, creating a functional kitchen workspace. The overall look is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban residential or communal kitchen environments.
description: A modern L-shaped kitchen cabinetry set with matte white finish, wood-textured countertop, and integrated appliances. Features handle-less doors and drawers for a sleek, minimalist look.
description_view_0: This view shows the cabinetry from above, highlighting the L-shape, wood countertop, integrated sink, and tall appliance units.
description_view_1: This view focuses on the long run of base cabinets and drawers, with the wood countertop and open space for a window or pass-through.
description_view_2: This view shows the back of the tall cabinetry, with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: This view presents the cabinetry from the rear, emphasizing the open pass-through or window cutout above the countertop.
attribute_cabinet_type: L-shaped kitchen suite (base cabinets, wall cabinets, tall pantry cabinets)
